title: Postpartum Restorative Sessions
alt: A stone sculpture of a mother tenderly cradling her child
description: The postpartum season asks an extraordinary amount from the body, mind, and nervous system. These in-home sessions offer intentional rest during a time often marked by exhaustion, transition, and continual giving of oneself. Each includes restorative positioning with supportive bolsters and pillows, guided meditation and introductory breathwork, and a one-hour immersive sound experience — bringing care directly into the home.
